fields.name: api_key
fields.title: API Key
fields.description: Your Exa API key from dashboard.exa.ai/api-keys

custom_description:
Exa is an AI-powered search engine that finds the exact content you're looking
for on the web using embeddings-based search. This connector provides access to
Exa's search, contents retrieval, and find-similar endpoints. All endpoints use
POST requests with JSON bodies. Requires an Exa API key from dashboard.exa.ai.
supported_questions:
- Search for latest news on Airbyte
- Find web pages similar to https://airbyte.com
- Get the full text content of https://airbyte.com
- Search for AI research papers published this year
- Find company pages related to data integration startups

parameters.name: query

schema.description: The search query string.

parameters.description: The search query string.

parameters.name: type

schema.description: The type of search. auto intelligently selects the best mode, instant provides lowest latency, fast uses lower-latency models, deep-lite provides lightweight synthesis, deep performs in-depth research with synthesis, and deep-reasoning adds more reasoning for complex searches.

parameters.description: The type of search. auto intelligently selects the best mode, instant provides lowest latency, fast uses lower-latency models, deep-lite provides lightweight synthesis, deep performs in-depth research with synthesis, and deep-reasoning adds more reasoning for complex searches.

parameters.name: category

schema.description: A data category to focus on for improved result quality.

parameters.description: A data category to focus on for improved result quality.

parameters.name: numResults

schema.description: Number of results to return (max 100).

parameters.description: Number of results to return (max 100).

parameters.name: includeDomains

schema.description: List of domains to include. If specified, results will only come from these domains.

parameters.description: List of domains to include. If specified, results will only come from these domains.

parameters.name: excludeDomains

schema.description: List of domains to exclude. If specified, no results will be returned from these domains.

parameters.description: List of domains to exclude. If specified, no results will be returned from these domains.

parameters.name: startPublishedDate

schema.description: Only return links published after this date. ISO 8601 format.

parameters.description: Only return links published after this date. ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: endPublishedDate

schema.description: Only return links published before this date. ISO 8601 format.

parameters.description: Only return links published before this date. ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: startCrawlDate

schema.description: Only return links crawled by Exa after this date. ISO 8601 format.

parameters.description: Only return links crawled by Exa after this date. ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: endCrawlDate

schema.description: Only return links crawled by Exa before this date. ISO 8601 format.

parameters.description: Only return links crawled by Exa before this date. ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: contents

schema.description: Options for requesting page contents inline with search results.

maxCharacters.description: Maximum character limit for the text.

includeHtmlTags.description: Include lightweight HTML tags in returned text.

text.description: Text extraction options. Pass true for defaults or an object for advanced options.

query.description: Custom query to guide highlight selection.

highlights.description: Highlight extraction options. Pass true for defaults or an object for advanced options.

query.description: Custom query for the LLM-generated summary.

parameters.description: Options for requesting page contents inline with search results.

parameters.name: moderation

schema.description: Enable content moderation to filter unsafe content.

parameters.description: Enable content moderation to filter unsafe content.

first_operation.description:
Perform a search with an Exa prompt-engineered query and retrieve a list
of relevant results. Optionally request contents (text, highlights, summary)
inline with the search results. Supports filtering by domain, date, category,
and number of results.

search_results.description:
Perform a search with an Exa prompt-engineered query and retrieve a list
of relevant results. Optionally request contents (text, highlights, summary)
inline with the search results. Supports filtering by domain, date, category,
and number of results.

contents.description:
Get the full page contents, summaries, and metadata for a list of URLs.
Returns instant results from Exa's cache, with automatic live crawling
as fallback for uncached pages. Use this to retrieve text, highlights,
and summaries for specific URLs.

similar_results.description:
Find web pages similar to a given URL. Uses Exa's embeddings to find
semantically similar content. Supports filtering by domains and dates.
